x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Interest Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Method to compute interest on a loan

Comment:
Example:
Fixed interest rate of 5% per year on a €20,000 personal loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Fee Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Method to compute service fees

Comment:
Example:
Loan processing fee = 1% of principal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Installment Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determines repayment schedule

Comment:
Example:
Equal monthly installments over 24 months

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Collateral Valuation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculates collateral value against product

Comment:
Example:
Property valued at €50,000 to secure a mortgage

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Risk-Adjusted Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Adjusts amounts based on risk profile

Comment:
Example:
Higher-risk borrower has higher interest applied
